chunks.title: Zedekiah's Reign and Pharaoh's Arrival
chunks.reason: Establishes the political context and the temporary withdrawal of the Chaldean army.

chunks.title: Oracle on Pharaoh's Army
chunks.reason: Yahweh's message through Jeremiah predicting the return of the Chaldeans.

chunks.title: Jeremiah Arrested and Interrogated
chunks.reason: Narrative of Jeremiah's arrest by Irijah, imprisonment, secret audience with Zedekiah, and his plea.

chunks.title: Jeremiah Moved to the Guard Court
chunks.reason: The conclusion of the chapter detailing Jeremiah's transfer and daily rations.
